pages.title: Six New Sigils
pages.text: Each sigil is crafted from its matching $(item)Reagent$() in the $(l:bloodmagic:alchemy_table)Alchemy Table$(). All six operate as $(item)toggleable$() sigils — use the bound-hand key to switch their effect on or off.

pages.title: Sigil of Swimming
pages.text: While active, the wielder breathes underwater and swims at surface speed. $(blood)100 LP/s$() while submerged.

pages.title: Sigil of the Ender
pages.text: Right-click to fling an $(item)ender pearl$()-equivalent projectile; teleports the wielder on contact. No cooldown — only LP.

pages.title: Sigil of Lightning
pages.text: Right-click to call a bolt onto the targeted block. Useful for creeper-processing, Charged Creeper farms, and intimidating livestock.

pages.title: Sigil of Divinity
pages.text: Grants Resistance, Regeneration, and Fire Resistance simultaneously while active. A heavy drain — for emergencies only.

pages.title: Sigil of Sentience
pages.text: Right-click a mob to nudge its AI — pacifies hostile mobs briefly, or redirects a pacified mob's target. Useful for crowd control.

pages.title: Sigil of Augmented Holding
pages.text: Expands the $(l:bloodmagic:altar)Sigil of Holding$() to carry eight sigils and cycle through them in-hand with the scroll wheel.
